method: Rendered the rebuilt 16-page proof with pdftoppm after further qualifying label-free screening, ideal-model detection, calibrated-test assumptions, and the activation-covariance isotropy caveat. Verified pdfinfo reports 16 letter pages and pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-proof contact sheet plus the changed proof pages at full size. The dense proof text and references were legible with no clipping, overlap, blank page, or alignment defects.
